LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAUL TRAVIS PRESTON'S MOTION FOR CLASS ACTION CERTIFICATION IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. --------- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR CLASS CERTIFICATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY MEET THE COMMUNITY OF INTEREST REQUIREMENT BECAUSE HE FAILS TO CITE A COMMON DEFECT THAT WOULD RENDER THE APARTMENTS UNINHABITABLE OR THAT THE CONDITIONS IN THE VARIOUS COMMON AREAS AFFECT RESIDENTS OR THEIR APARTMENTS IN A SIMILAR MANNER. Notice Of Motion For Class Action Certification
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF PAUL TRAVIS PRESTON'S MOTION FOR CLASS ACTION CERTIFICATION.

APPEARANCES: Timothy J. Kodani, Esq. of Law Offices Timothy J. Kodani 951-4640 for pltf & moving party; Paul Caleo, Esq. of Burnham Brown 510/835-6809 for defts & opposing parties Amit Motawala, Sunilbhai K. Patel, Amit Motawala and Sunilbhai K. Patel, a general partnership dba Prita Hotel; Melissa Wood Eisenberg, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP 524-4307 for deft & opposing party Francis Malakis.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR CLASS CERTIFICATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY MEET THE COMMUNITY OF INTEREST REQUIREMENT BECAUSE HE FAILS TO CITE A COMMON DEFECT THAT WOULD RENDER THE APARTMENTS UNINHABITABLE OR THAT THE CONDITIONS IN THE VARIOUS COMMON AREAS AFFECT RESIDENTS OR THEIR APARTMENTS IN A SIMILAR MANNER.
Mr. Caleo to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
